chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No.367 of 2016 The Commissioner Inland Revenue Versus M/s Digitec System Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection No.18 2. For orders on CMA 216/18 3. For hearing of main case Dated: 21.10.2021 None present. -.-.- This Reference is pending since 2016 and the applicant’s counsel has not cared to have fixed even once. Even today none is present on behalf of the applicant and there is no intimation either. Instant Income Tax Reference Application as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge
